## Test Codes

```sh
# Python
python3 ./<solution>.py

# java
javac "<solution>.java"
java <solution>

# Go
go run <solution>.go

# Rust
rustc <solution>.rs
./<solution>

# C++
g++ -o <executable> <solution>.cpp
./<executable>

# Typescript
npx ts-node "<solution>.ts"

```
